first_run.rationale: The score is identical, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively the same. Both versions correctly identify the candidate's strengths in tooling and full-stack development, and the same core weakness regarding a lack of deep experience in enterprise JVM/IDE development. The minor differences in phrasing between the two evaluations are well within the range of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the switch of all job locations to Kenya.
